app.title: 3D Printed Paper Craft
mainpage.guideVideo.label: Guide Video
toolbar.left.renderLoad.label: Render load: {count}
preview.right.faceCount.label: Faces: {count}
preview.right.placeholder: Switch to [Group Edit] mode to start editing
preview.right.placeholder.edit: Left-click in the 3D view to add faces.
settings.title: Project Settings
rename.title: Rename Unfold Group
export.title: Export Unfold Group
export.batchFileHint.3mf: Download {count} 3MF files, one per valid group
export.batchFileHint.stl: Download {count} STL files, one per valid group
export.batchFileHint.step: Download {count} STEP files, one per valid group
export.batchFileHint.png: Download {count} PNG files, one per valid group
luminaLayers.title: Lumina-Layers Tool
luminaLayers.dropZone: Click to choose a file or drag it here
luminaLayers.videoLink: For detailed usage, please refer to this video:
luminaLayers.purpose: This tool is intended to be used together with the Lumina-Layers multi-color printing software.
luminaLayers.step1.text: Export the current group texture as the source image for Lumina-Layers.
luminaLayers.step2.text: After importing the image into Lumina-Layers, generate and download the 3MF file with these settings.
luminaLayers.step2.item1: After enabling [Advanced]-[Unlock Max Size Limit], set [Parameters]-[Width] to {width}.
luminaLayers.step3.text: Import the 3MF file exported from Lumina-Layers to generate the joinable multi-color group model.
luminaLayers.wait.running: This task takes a while. Please wait.
luminaLayers.wait.error.title: 3MF file validation failed
luminaLayers.wait.error.advice: Please regenerate the 3MF file from Lumina-Layers using the settings shown in the guide.
luminaLayers.wait.error.retryAdvice: Please verify the model and try again.
luminaLayers.wait.error.buildModel.title: Failed to generate unfold group model
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.generic: The imported 3MF file structure does not meet the expected requirements
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.runtimeGe: An unknown error occurred during model generation
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.EMPTY_NEG: The generated anti-aliasing mesh is empty
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.COMPONENT: Expected the composite object to contain at least 2 child objects
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.INVALID_B: No child object named Backing was found
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.PRIMARY_M: The primary model part was not found in the 3MF file
The XML content of the primary model part is invalid
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.REFERENCE: A referenced model part is missing
A referenced object could not be resolved
luminaLayers.wait.error.reason.PLATE_MET: No project metadata was found to determine the plate count
settings.scale.label: Scale
settings.scale.desc: Overall model scale. If it’s too small, generating the print file may fail.
settings.joinType.label: Default Join Type
settings.joinType.desc: Default connection mode for seam edges.
settings.clawInterlockingAngle.label: Interlock Angle
settings.clawInterlockingAngle.desc: Interlocking angle of the claws. Min {min}, max {max}.
settings.clawTargetRadius.label: Target Claw Radius
settings.clawTargetRadius.desc: Desired claw size. Min {min}, max {max}, in mm.
settings.clawRadiusAdaptive.label: Adaptive Claw Radius
settings.clawRadiusAdaptive.desc: Adjust claw radius by seam angle for stronger locking.
settings.clawWidth.label: Claw Width
settings.clawWidth.desc: Width of a single claw. Min {min}, max {max}, in mm.
settings.clawFitGap.label: Claw Fit Gap
settings.clawFitGap.desc: Claw tightness: larger values are easier to assemble, {min}-{max}
settings.minFoldAngleThreshold.label: Min Fold Angle
settings.minFoldAngleThreshold.desc: No fold is generated when the angle is below this value.
settings.layerHeight.label: Layer Height
settings.layerHeight.desc: Layer height used during actual printing, in mm.
settings.luminaLayersTotalHeight.label: Lumina-Layers Total Height
settings.luminaLayersTotalHeight.desc: Lumina-Layers height excluding the backing, in mm.
settings.connectionLayers.label: Connection Layers
settings.bodyLayers.label: Extra Body Layers
settings.bodyLayers.desc: Additional layers for the main body of faces. {min}-{max}.
settings.tabWidth.label: Seam Tab Width
settings.tabWidth.desc: Width of seam tabs for bonding. {min}-{max}, in mm.
settings.tabThickness.label: Seam Tab Thickness
settings.tabThickness.desc: Thickness of seam tabs for bonding. {min}-{max}, in mm.
settings.tabClipGap.label: Clip Fit Gap
settings.tabClipGap.desc: Tab clip gap (tightness). Larger = easier to fit. {min}-{max}.
settings.antiSlipClip.label: Anti-Slip Clip
settings.antiSlipClip.desc: Whether to generate anti-slip clip structures.
settings.clipGapAdjusts.label: Clip Gap Adjuest
settings.clipGapAdjusts.desc: Clip fit gap auto-adjusts inversely to tab thickness.
settings.includeTextureInProject.label: Include Texture When Saving Project
settings.textureColorSpace.label: Color Space
settings.textureColorSpace.desc: If texture colors look wrong, try changing this option.
settings.textureSamplingMode.label: Sampling Mode
settings.textureSamplingMode.desc: Controls texture filtering for preview and export.
settings.textureFlipY.label: Vertical Flip
settings.textureFlipY.desc: If texture placement looks wrong, try changing this option.
settings.hollow.label: Hollow Style
settings.hollow.desc: Removes the center area of each triangle face.
settings.wireframeThickness.label: Wireframe Thickness
settings.wireframeThickness.desc: Wireframe thickness in Hollow Style. {min}-{max}, in mm.
op.group.rename: Click and hold group tab to rename
op.group.face.add: Left-click to add face to group
op.group.face.remove: Right-click to remove face from group
